prompt: Build a premium landing page for CodeLens AI, an AI-powered code review platform. Use Next.js with App Router, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Add React Three Fiber for a 3D hero section with floating code block geometry and an AI analysis sphere with bloom post-processing. Include Framer Motion scroll animations, a features grid showcasing 4 key capabilities, a pricing section with 3 tiers, testimonials, and a strong CTA. Dark theme with blue-purple accent colors.
expected_sections: 3D Hero with floating geometry + AI sphere
expected_3d_features: Floating code block geometry with rotation
Central AI analysis sphere with emissive material
design_notes: Dark background (#0A0A0F range), blue-to-purple gradient accents, glassmorphism cards, Inter + JetBrains Mono fonts
